mainSection.title: Transform school administration with our solution.
mainSection.subtitle: Centralize your institution's management. With Odyssea, you can manage cohorts, student grades, and schedules. All this comes with integrated instant messaging, video courses, activity tracking, QR code attendance, and much more.

mainSection2.title: No need to use multiple management solutions
mainSection2.subtitle: More than just a solution. Odyssea is the Swiss army knife for managing your institution.

item1.title: Report attendance
item1.content: Students can report their attendance in seconds by scanning a QR code, significantly reducing the time needed for manual roll calls.

item2.title: Simplify schedule management
item2.content: Significantly reduce the time spent creating and updating schedules. Fewer human errors thanks to automation and data validation.

item3.title: Real-time activity tracking
item3.content: Track every activity in real time. From attendance and scheduling to instant communication, everything is centralized.

item1.title: Simple and fast migration
item1.content: Save time by importing student lists exported from another solution to create classes quickly.

item2.title: Real-time activity tracking
item2.content: Monitor key activity across your institution and keep a clear view of what is happening every day.

item3.title: Manage schedules efficiently
item3.content: Adjust timetables faster and reduce friction when last-minute changes happen.

item1.title: Transparency
item1.content: No unpleasant surprises. Pricing, terms, and the support framework are clearly defined from the start.

item2.title: Availability
item2.content: We handle your requests responsively so you can keep moving without leaving important topics blocked.

item3.title: Maintainability
item3.content: You automatically benefit from product improvements to keep your solution sustainable and up to date.

PRICING.subtitle: No hidden fees. No commitment.

seo.title: Odyssea Features | Document management, tracking, organization, and communication
seo.description: Discover everything Odyssea helps centralize: document management, daily organization, activity tracking, communication, and coordination for your institution.

hero.title: The central page to understand everything Odyssea can do.
hero.subtitle: Document management, daily organization, activity tracking, communication, and coordination: Odyssea brings together the essential building blocks to run your institution with more clarity.

highlights.1: A solution designed to centralize an institution's essential uses
highlights.2: Hands-on support, not just software delivery
highlights.3: A flexible structure that adapts to your methods rather than the other way around

section.title: A cross-functional tool built for everyday work
section.subtitle: Each functional block addresses a concrete need: organize better, structure better, track better, and communicate better.

ged.title: Document management
ged.description: Centralize your administrative and educational documents in one space accessible to the right people at the right time.

items.1: Organize documents by cohort, class, or department
items.2: Controlled sharing of course materials and administrative files
items.3: Update history to keep track of changes

organization.title: Daily organization
organization.description: Avoid switching between multiple tools and keep a clear view of your institution's operations.

items.3: Internal task management for teaching and administrative teams

tracking.title: Tracking tools
tracking.description: Track institution activity in real time so you can make the right decisions faster.

items.1: Overview of the day's key events
items.2: Tracking for students, cohorts, and important interactions
items.3: Useful indicators to quickly spot bottlenecks

communication.title: Integrated communication
communication.description: Make exchanges smoother without multiplying channels or losing information along the way.

items.2: Sharing important updates with the whole community
items.3: Simpler coordination between leadership, teams, and learners

cta.title: Need a more concrete view?
cta.subtitle: The Odyssea support journey explains how we move from the initial assessment to a rollout tailored to your structure.

seo.title: About Odyssea | Vision, support, and values
seo.description: Learn who is behind Odyssea, the vision behind the project, and the values that shape our support approach.

hero.title: Odyssea has a simple vision: bring order where tools have become scattered.
hero.subtitle: Behind Odyssea is the desire to offer a more human, clearer, and more useful framework for institutions that want to run their daily operations better without being trapped in unnecessary complexity.

story.title: Who is behind Odyssea?
story.paragraph1: Odyssea is driven by a close relationship with organizations that need both a central tool and a partner able to understand their real constraints.
story.paragraph2: The ambition is not only to digitize isolated actions. It is to create a calmer, more coherent management experience that is easier to sustain every day.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.content: Build a solution that follows real-world operations: documents to find, information to track, teams to coordinate, and decisions to make without wasting time.

valuesSection.title: Our values
valuesSection.subtitle: What we aim to uphold in every client relationship and every product improvement.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.content: We want to make daily operations easier to read, smoother to run, and less fragmented.

proximity.title: Proximity
proximity.content: Odyssea grows through close contact with field needs and a practical support mindset.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.content: Our vision is to provide a robust framework that stays useful over time, even as the organization evolves.

cta.title: The method matters as much as the tool.
cta.subtitle: If you want to understand how support unfolds in practice, the dedicated page presents the customer journey step by step.

seo.title: Odyssea FAQ | Services, support, and how it works
seo.description: Find answers to common questions about Odyssea services, the customer journey, and how the solution works overall.

hero.title: Answers to the most common questions about our services and overall approach.
hero.subtitle: This page brings together the essential points for understanding who Odyssea is for, how support works, and what the solution improves day to day.

1.question: Who is Odyssea for?
1.answer: Odyssea is designed for institutions that want to centralize their organization, documents, and operational tracking in a single environment.

2.question: Does Odyssea replace several tools?
2.answer: Yes. The goal is precisely to reduce tool sprawl by bringing key uses together in a more coherent environment.

3.question: Do you provide onboarding support?
3.answer: Yes. The approach includes an initial assessment, needs framing, and progressive support to make adoption easier.

4.question: Can the solution adapt to how we work?
4.answer: The Odyssea approach aims to align with your real priorities so the rollout remains useful, understandable, and sustainable.

5.question: How can we discover the solution more concretely?
5.answer: You can request a demo or visit the "How it works" page to see the customer journey from the first conversation to ongoing support.

cta.title: Do you have a more specific question?
cta.subtitle: We can start from your context and show you the support journey that best fits your situation.

seo.title: How it works | The Odyssea customer journey
seo.description: Understand the Odyssea method: sign-up, assessment, rollout framing, and ongoing support.

hero.title: The Odyssea customer journey, from first contact to ongoing support.
hero.subtitle: This is not about technical details. It is about method, relationship, and progression. The goal is to make your transition clear, reassuring, and adapted to your reality.

1.title: 1. Sign-up and first conversation
1.content: We start from your context, priorities, and pain points to frame the right level of support.

2.title: 2. Assessment
2.content: We review your current organization, the tools already in place, and the needs to centralize first.

3.title: 3. Rollout framing
3.content: We define a simple, progressive, and realistic rollout plan aligned with your operational constraints.

4.title: 4. Support
4.content: We move forward with you through onboarding, adjustments, and the installation of lasting working habits.

support.title: An approach designed to reduce friction
support.subtitle: Each step is meant to clarify what comes next, avoid gray areas, and help you move forward with a trajectory that is understandable from the start.

seo.title: Odyssea Pricing | Clear plans tailored to your institution
seo.description: Explore Odyssea pricing and included features to centralize the management of your institution.

seo.title: Request an Odyssea demo | Start your support journey
seo.description: Share a few details about your institution to start the conversation and discover the Odyssea support approach.

1.title: Your contact details
1.subtitle: Let’s start with the main contact person who will lead the conversation with Odyssea.

2.title: Your institution
2.subtitle: We need a few key details about your organization to frame the support properly.

4.subtitle: Select the topics you want to tackle first.

5.title: Your timeline
5.subtitle: Tell us when you want to move forward and what matters most to you.

6.title: Conversation format
6.subtitle: Choose the most convenient way to organize the demo or first conversation.

7.title: Final review
7.subtitle: Add any final context, then confirm your request.
